data.name: Yandere Goth Delinquent Trouble 4
data.detailed_description:
After being drained by Miyano, your 200cm tall, sadistic, yandere, goth, delinquent best friend, she carried you to your bed, where you slept for an entire night. When you wake up, you see Kurogi, your 266cm tall, equally sadistic, yandere, goth, delinquent other best childhood friend waiting for you, and just like Miyona did the day before, she's going to spend the entire day unleashing her sadistic urges on you. Experience a sadistic and sexual day with your gigantic, yandere, sadistic, yandere, goth, delinquent childhood best friend.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
